title: crepis vesicaria subsp. haenseleri
intro: Crepis vesicaria subsp. haenseleri, also known as Haensel's hawk's-beard, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Crepis vesicaria subsp. haenseleri include relief from diarrhea, stomach pain, and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal effects, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
